answers.where: Battle arena with the sourced Assault Walker hero, drone target, stylized studs floor, station props, heat bar, and mobile-style action controls.
answers.action: Move with WASD and read the hero mech attack/heat state during battle.
answers.response: The hero mech now reads larger and more energetic in combat, with brighter cockpit, weapon, and heat accents.
answers.reward: The primary player object is more visually owned and easier to inspect during action.
answers.game_look: Bright Roblox-like toy mech combat with sourced mechs, stronger hero material zones, heat/attack glow, stylized studs world, readable controls, and clear battle HUD.

issues.text: The hero mech is larger and has stronger toy-plastic color zones plus heat/attack accents, but still needs authored material masks and better animation states to reach final mech quality.
